description_long: This object is a large, wheeled artillery cannon mounted on a robust carriage. The cannon features a long, dark metallic barrel with reinforced rings and a flared muzzle, supported by a heavy-duty frame. The carriage is equipped with four spoked wheels, each reinforced with metal rivets, and the structure includes angular armor plates and mechanical supports. The rear of the carriage has a spiked protrusion, likely for stabilization during firing. The overall finish is a dark, matte metal, giving it a formidable and utilitarian appearance. The design suggests it is intended for heavy combat use, with visible mechanical joints and mounting brackets.
description: A large, dark metal wheeled artillery cannon with a reinforced barrel and spoked wheels, mounted on a robust carriage with angular armor plates.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle of the cannon, the symmetrical arrangement of the wheels, and the angular armor plates on the carriage.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the cannon barrel, the spoked wheels, and the mechanical supports of the carriage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cannon barrel, the alignment of the wheels, and the spiked stabilizer at the rear.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the barrel, wheels, and carriage structure, with visible mounting brackets and armor.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large fixed cannon barrel mounted centrally on the carriage; no additional weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Visible angular armor plating covers the carriage sides and supports, appearing thick and robust, with riveted reinforcement.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; the vehicle is finished in a solid dark color.
attribute_tire_type: Four large spoked wheels with metal rims and no visible tread pattern; not typical pneumatic tires.
